# Bluefin Air-Conditioning & Electrical

> Licensed air-conditioning and electrical specialists serving Wollongong, Illawarra, Shellharbour, Kiama, Dapto and surrounding NSW regions. Free quotes, upfront pricing, 24/7 emergency callouts.

## About

Bluefin Air-Conditioning & Electrical is a locally owned trade business based in Wollongong, NSW, Australia. We specialise in residential and light commercial air conditioning installation, servicing and repairs, and all electrical work. We are fully licensed and insured with a team of A-grade electricians and qualified refrigeration mechanics.

- **Phone:** 0428 631 931
- **Email:** info@bluefinairandelec.com.au
- **Website:** https://www.bluefinaircon.com.au
- **Location:** Wollongong, NSW, Australia
- **Service Region:** Illawarra, Wollongong, Shellharbour, Kiama, Dapto, and Greater Sydney

## Licences

- Contractor Licence: 982390C (air conditioning & refrigeration)
- Electrical Contractor Licence: L191263 (A-grade electricians)

## Services

### Air Conditioning Installation
Supply and installation of split systems, multi-head systems, and ducted air conditioning for residential and light commercial properties. All major brands including Mitsubishi Electric, Daikin, Fujitsu, LG, Samsung, Panasonic, and Actron Air.

- Split system supply and install from $1,200–$2,500
- Multi-head (3-zone) systems from $3,500
- Ducted systems from $6,000–$15,000 depending on home size

### Air Conditioning Servicing & Repairs
Annual service, filter cleaning, gas top-ups, fault diagnosis, and repairs for all brands of air conditioning. Annual service visits from $150–$250 for a standard split system. Most repairs completed same day.

### Electrical Work
All general electrical work including:
- Switchboard upgrades (single-phase from $1,500–$2,500)
- Safety switch and RCD installation
- Power point installation
- Lighting installation and upgrades
- EV charger installation
- Emergency electrical fault repair

### Emergency Callouts
24/7 emergency response for electrical faults and air conditioning failures across the Illawarra and Wollongong. Emergency rates apply outside standard hours.

## Service Areas

Bluefin operates primarily in the Illawarra and Wollongong regions of NSW:

- Wollongong (all suburbs)
- Shellharbour
- Kiama
- Dapto
- Fairy Meadow
- Thirroul
- Corrimal
- Albion Park
- Oak Flats
- Nowra / Shoalhaven
- Helensburgh
- Greater Sydney (selected jobs)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does air conditioning installation cost in Wollongong?**
Split system supply and install typically costs $1,200–$2,500 depending on the unit size and brand. We provide fixed-price quotes with no hidden charges.

**What air conditioning brands do you install?**
Mitsubishi Electric, Daikin, Fujitsu, LG, Samsung, Panasonic, Carrier, and Actron Air. We recommend the right brand for each situation.

**How often should I service my air conditioner?**
At least once a year, ideally before summer. Coastal properties (Wollongong, Kiama, Thirroul) benefit from 6-monthly servicing due to salt air exposure.

**Are you a licensed electrician?**
Yes. Electrical Contractor Licence L191263. All electrical work is performed by A-grade licensed electricians.

**Do you offer 24/7 emergency callouts?**
Yes. Call 0428 631 931 at any time for urgent electrical faults or air conditioning failures.

**Do you service the Shellharbour area?**
Yes — we regularly work throughout Shellharbour, Albion Park, Oak Flats, Warilla, and surrounding areas.

**What size air conditioner do I need?**
- Up to 20m² (small bedroom): 2.5kW
- 20–35m² (main bedroom): 3.5kW
- 35–60m² (living area): 6–7kW
- 60m²+ (large open plan): 8–9kW+

**Do you do free quotes?**
Yes — all quotes are free, written, and fixed price. We never start work without your approval.

## Business Hours

- Monday to Friday: 7:00am – 5:30pm
- Saturday: 8:00am – 2:00pm
- Emergency: 24/7

## Trust Signals

- Fully licensed and insured
- 5-star rated local business
- Free written quotes, upfront fixed pricing
- No hidden costs — price agreed before work begins
- Manufacturer warranties passed on to customer
- Labour warranty on all work
